name: Compare NYT vs WSJ Perplexity suits - key differences?

mainEntity.name: Compare NYT vs WSJ Perplexity suits - key differences?

acceptedAnswer.text: NYT adds TM/hallucinations; similar core IP.[1][2]
acceptedAnswer.description: NYT emphasizes hallucinations/trademarks; WSJ/NY Post focus scraping substitution.[1][2] Both seek injunctions/damages; NYT in SDNY, others pending.[2] Key: broader claims in NYT. Follow all for precedent.
